Ko 2 Kannama Song Lyrics
Singers: Chinmayi, Inno Genga
Music: Leon James
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Baby Baby you are driving me crazy..
Baby Baby you still amaze me..

Mazhaya illa veyyila
Un paarvai vaanavillaa
Yaadhum vizhundhuvidum valayaa
Mudhalaa illa mudivaa
Un paarvai neelum kadhayaa
Naalum thondanthu varum alaiyaa

Un paarvai penna inbamaa
Naan virumbum valiyaa
Un paarvai uyirai kollumaa
porkalamaa

Naan uraikiren
Mezhukaipol mella karaikiren

Nee paarka adadaa adadaa
Ayaayoo adadaa adadaa
Naan irakiren
Marupadi adi pirakiren

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kannamma?

The song Kannamma is a romantic melody that explores themes of love and longing.

Who composed the music for Ko 2?

The music for Ko 2 was composed by Leon James.

Who is the singer of the song Kannamma?

The song Kannamma is sung by Chinmayi.

What role does the song play in the movie Ko 2?

In Ko 2, the song Kannamma adds a layer of emotional depth, highlighting the protagonist's feelings.

When was the song Kannamma released?

The song Kannamma was released in 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannamma from the movie Ko 2 is a beautiful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Chinmayi, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar evoke deep emotions. Leon James' music complements the tender feelings expressed in the song, making it a favorite for romantic occasions. The song's placement in the movie adds emotional depth to the storyline, resonating with the audience's own experiences of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannamma from the movie Ko 2, where Chinmayi's soulful voice meets Leon James' captivating music. This romantic track, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with this soothing melody that continues to resonate with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: Baby Baby you are driving me crazy.. Baby Baby you still amaze me..
Without rain or sunshine, your gaze is like a rainbow. Everything falls apart, is it the beginning or the end? Your gaze is a long story, waves keep coming.
Your gaze, girl, is it happiness? Is it the path I desire? Does your gaze take my life, is it a battle?
When you look, oh my, oh my, I melt like wax, slowly melting.
When you look, oh my, oh my, I fall and rise again.
Baby Baby you are driving me crazy.. Baby Baby you still amaze me..
Baby Baby you are driving me crazy.. Baby Baby don't you leave me..
Your one look says many words. What can silence say? The language of your eyes is enough.
Love, why do we need words to speak? In the touch of fingers, you know my love, dear!
When you look, oh my, oh my, I melt like wax, slowly melting.
When you look, oh my, oh my, I fall and rise again.
Without rain or sunshine, my gaze is like a rainbow. Everything falls apart, is it the beginning or the end? My gaze is a long story, waves keep coming.
Your gaze, girl, is it happiness? Is it the path I desire? Does your gaze take my life, is it a battle?
When you look, oh my, oh my, I melt like wax, slowly melting.
When you look, oh my, oh my, I fall and rise again.
